blended.narrative: Breckenridge is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,991 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 24".
